summary: Iteration 47: Tested 3 new iWhistle features - Recurring Schedule Generator, CSV Import support, and League Season Tab. All 17 features PASS. The Recurring Schedule Dialog provides a complete 3-step wizard (Configure > Assign Referees > Preview & Create) for auto-generating league seasons. League Import Dialog now accepts CSV files alongside Excel. League Season Tab shows calendar and weekly views with stats.

generate_recurring_button_visible.detail: Purple 'Generate Recurring' button visible on Manager > Tournaments tab with CalendarClock icon

recurring_dialog_opens.detail: Dialog opens with title 'Recurring Schedule Generator' and description about auto-generating league season

recurring_step_indicator_3_steps.detail: Step indicator shows: Configure > Assign Referees > Preview & Create

recurring_configure_fields.detail: Configure step shows all fields: Name, Location, Division, Pay, Courts, Day of Week, Date Range, Game Times

recurring_day_of_week_selector.detail: Day of Week selector shows all 7 days (Sunday through Saturday)

recurring_game_times_section.detail: Game Times section shows 3 default time inputs (07:00 PM, 08:00 PM, 09:00 PM) with + Add Time button

recurring_season_summary_card.detail: Season Summary card appears when date range and times are set, showing game nights and total games

recurring_assign_referees_step.detail: Assign Referees step shows 3 available referees (Demo Referee, Jordan Ellis, Olivia Brooks) with checkboxes

recurring_preview_step.detail: Preview step shows generated games grouped by date (e.g., Wednesday, Apr 1, 2026) with time slots and 'Create X Games' button

league_import_accepts_csv.detail: File input accept attribute is '.xlsx,.xls,.csv' - accepts both Excel and CSV files

league_import_format_descriptions.detail: Dialog shows both 'Grouped format' and 'Flat table' format descriptions with CSV badge visible

league_season_tab_visible.detail: League Season tab visible in Manager page navigation bar with CalendarRange icon

league_season_stats.detail: Stats displayed: 10 Game Nights, 27 Total Games, 0 Completed, 27 Upcoming, 0 Refs Assigned, $1350 Total Pay

league_season_calendar_view.detail: Season Calendar view shows monthly grid with game dots on relevant dates (Wednesdays for ADULT BASKETBALL)

league_season_month_navigation.detail: Month navigation with prev/next buttons working - navigated from April 2026 to March 2026

league_season_weekly_view.detail: Weekly View tab shows detailed game table with columns: Time, Matchup, Venue, Referees, Status, Pay

league_season_tournament_selector.detail: Tournament selector dropdown visible, auto-selected 'ADULT BASKETBALL Spring 2026(Wednesday Nights)'

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Recurring Schedule Dialog has clean 3-step wizard with proper state management
GOOD: Date range picker uses shadcn Calendar component with 2-month view for easy range selection
GOOD: Referee rotation logic auto-assigns refs across game nights
GOOD: League Season Tab provides comprehensive calendar and weekly views with stats
GOOD: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
GOOD: CSV support added to League Import with proper format detection
MINOR: Console shows Firebase deprecation warning about enableIndexedDbPersistence() - consider updating to FirestoreSettings.cache
seed_data_creation: No new data created - tested with existing 'ADULT BASKETBALL Spring 2026(Wednesday Nights)' tournament (27 games)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully working: 1) Recurring Schedule Generator - 3-step wizard to auto-generate league seasons with referee rotation. 2) League Import Dialog now accepts CSV files alongside Excel with flat table format support. 3) League Season Tab provides calendar (monthly) and weekly views for league games. The ADULT BASKETBALL Spring 2026 tournament has 27 games across 10 Wednesday nights (Mar-May 2026). All data-testid attributes are properly set for automated testing.
